title: About
subtitle: CRM & Smart Business Card Management Platform — Bold Premium Edition

scanning.title: Fast Card Scanning
scanning.desc: Digitize business cards in seconds with AI-powered OCR technology.

crm.title: Advanced CRM
crm.desc: Log meetings, track relationship statuses, and set reminders.

vcard.title: Digital Business Card (vCard)
vcard.desc: Create your digital business card and share via QR code or link.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.desc: AES-256-GCM encryption, CSRF protection, two-factor authentication (TOTP), corporate SSO/SAML, role-based access control, and distributed rate limiting.

pwa.title: PWA Support
pwa.desc: Install the app on your phone and continue using it even offline.

notifications.title: Email Notifications
notifications.desc: Automatic reminder emails for follow-ups, welcome emails for new users, and approval notifications. Fully optional — works without SMTP configuration.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.desc: One-command database and file backup with automatic daily scheduling via cron. Restore to any point with timestamp-based recovery. Last 7 backups retained.

design.title: Customizable Dashboard
design.desc: Bold Premium design with gradient accents, dark/light themes, and user-customizable dashboard widgets. Toggle and reorder widgets to fit your workflow.

i18n.title: Multilingual Support
i18n.desc: Full Turkish and English language support with real-time switching and lazy-loaded translations for fast page loads.
